authors: Fatih Serkant Adiguzel a Faculty of Arts and Social Sciences
Turkeyb Center of Excellence in Data Analytics
raw_title: Propaganda during Economic Crises: Reference Point Adjustment in Economic News
title_en: Propaganda during Economic Crises: Reference Point Adjustment in Economic News
title_zh: 经济危机期间的宣传：经济新闻中的参考点调整
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了在经济危机期间，经济新闻如何通过调整参考点来影响公众认知。它分析了媒体如何通过改变比较基准来塑造人们对经济状况的看法，这可能涉及宣传策略。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how economic news influences public perception during economic crises by adjusting reference points. It analyzes how media shape views of economic conditions by changing comparison benchmarks, which may involve propaganda strategies.
research_direction_zh: 研究关注媒体在经济危机中的角色，特别是如何通过新闻框架和参考点调整来影响公众舆论和经济决策，属于政治传播和媒体效果领域。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on the role of media during economic crises, particularly how news framing and reference point adjustments influence public opinion and economic decisions, falling within political communication and media effects.
